chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: 4963 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "إِنَّمَا شَفَاعَتِي لِأَهْلِ اَلْكَبَائِرِ مِنْ أُمَّتِي".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4963 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Indeed, my intercession is for the sinners who commit major sins from my nation."
